current_step: Phase 4 lightweight dry-run verification passed; final_approval gate pending.

todowrite_snapshot.content: Detect context mode and confirm with user [GATE]
Declare framework profile and execution surface map
Draft review — present draft for user approval [GATE]
Final approval — present dry-run results for user approval [GATE]
Record decisions and dry-run results in session

requirements_summary.problem: Gauntlet phase files import the global cost_tracker singleton from models.py, creating a layer violation and broad test monkeypatch surface. CON-001 litellm pathway concern is out of scope because source verification showed the generated concern drifted from current code.
requirements_summary.proposal: Create token_tracking.py with TokenTracker/tracker, hard-rename add() to record_call(), move gauntlet tracking to gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model(), remove tracker imports from phase files, and migrate tests to a fresh_tracker fixture.
behavioral_constraints: CON-001 remains out of scope; debate may not expand this session into litellm pathway unification without explicit user approval.
Hard rename is required: CostTracker -> TokenTracker, cost_tracker -> tracker, add() -> record_call(), with no deprecation shim.
Read-side fields remain stable: total_cost, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, by_model, summary().
Gauntlet phase files must not import the tracker singleton; gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model() is the gauntlet tracking boundary.
Debate/CLI model handlers in models.py keep their inline record_call() sites for this spec.
Deterministic mocked dispatch parity is sufficient; no real model-call smoke test required.
Do not manually edit generated .architecture docs solely for hygiene; record status in session/spec artifacts and let next mapcodebase regenerate docs.

completed_work: Phase 01 requirements complete: scope=CON-002 only; CON-001 marked drifted (concerns.md numbers don't match source — only 2 litellm sites, both temp=0.7, neither sets max_tokens). Decisions locked: new token_tracking.py with TokenTracker; .add() -> .record_call(); hard rename, no shim; phase files stop importing singleton; gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model() owns .record_call(); debate-side asymmetric (per-handler .record_call() stays in models.py:708/759/810/874); fresh_tracker opt-in pytest fixture replaces ~30 monkeypatches; phased commits (tests first, production follows). RequirementsSummary written and user-edited (R5 reframed: don't manually edit .architecture/ docs; let next /mapcodebase regen). Codex advanced through Phase 02 (roadmap manifest, overview, tests-pseudo, fizzy-plan) into Phase 03 producing spec-draft-v1.md (366 lines). Spec adds: Phase 3 filtering side-effect (newly tracked after refactor), cost-formula port spec, deterministic mocked parity test, deployment-via-symlink note. Card 1851 G1 gate unblocked via pipeline_patch_state escape hatch; incident note filed at .adversarial-spec/issues/2026-04-29-human-gate-cross-project-leak.md (root cause: fizzy-pipeline-mcp config.py:137 hardcodes ENABLE_HUMAN_GATES=1, gate tuple in pipeline.py:100 applies to all boards, no relay wired for adversarial-spec, listener service is a stub).
next_action: Approve Phase 4 final artifacts so they can be published and the session can advance toward gauntlet.

journey.event: Phase 01 entered. doc_type=spec, depth=technical confirmed; starting point=concerns.md CON-001+002 confirmed; awaiting interview-mode decision on resume.
Phase 03 entry. Codex produced spec-draft-v1.md after Phase 01/02. Card 1851 G1 gate manually patched (cross-project leak workaround).

subprofiles.mutation_model: CLI commands and in-process function calls
subprofiles.error_model: Python exceptions plus CLI exit codes

framework_profile.enforcement_model: CLI model-name validation remains in gauntlet/model_dispatch.py; token accounting writes are enforced by resolving token_tracking.tracker at call time inside dispatch and model-handler boundaries.

goals: Remove gauntlet phase dependency on models.cost_tracker.
Rename cost tracking to token tracking with clear API names.
Keep model-call behavior unchanged except for the tracking boundary.
Reduce test monkeypatch surface to one fixture pattern.
Capture CON-002 remediation and CON-001 drift in durable session/spec artifacts.
non_goals: Manual edits to generated .architecture docs solely for hygiene.

user_stories.want: all tracker references audited before edits
user_stories.benefit: the hard rename does not miss hidden callers or stale monkeypatches
tracking tests patch one stable boundary instead of phase-local globals
token accounting names match actual behavior while existing read-side summaries stay stable
phase files remain focused on phase logic and stop reaching into models.py

user_stories.want: resolved and drifted concern status captured in durable artifacts
user_stories.benefit: the next session does not re-open CON-001 or lose the reason for CON-002

story_alignment.rationale: Audit story maps to removing phase dependency on models.cost_tracker before edits.
fresh_tracker fixture story maps to reducing monkeypatch surface.
TokenTracker.record_call story maps to token tracking rename and API clarity.
model_dispatch.call_model ownership maps to preserving model-call behavior while moving tracking boundary.
Durable status capture maps to recording CON-002 remediation and CON-001 drift.

research_findings.finding: models.py owns parallel model dispatch and current global CostTracker; CLI models are routed by prefix and report zero cost.
gauntlet phases consume model_dispatch.call_model and checkpoint phase outputs; current cost_tracker coupling is cross-cutting but guarded by CostTracker lock.
Project is a Python CLI package requiring Python >=3.10 with pytest and ruff verification paths.

dimensions.name: runtime
dimensions.rationale: adversarial-spec is invoked through CLI entrypoints and local skill scripts.

dimensions.name: context_mode
dimensions.rationale: This session remediates an existing architecture concern, CON-002 cost_tracker coupling, without adding a new user-facing feature.

dimensions.name: primary_surface
dimensions.rationale: The risky contract is the internal gauntlet/model_dispatch.call_model API and token tracking owner module.
